summary: Tested signup redirect bug fix for all user types. 12/12 backend tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed Surfer, Photographer, and Verified Pro Photographer redirects work correctly. Hobbyist and Business users correctly go to /feed (they get free/business tier automatically). Username validation is working - required field prevents submission.

code_quality.issue: Dead code - Business role check uses userData.role.includes('Business') but business roles are named School, Coach, Shop, Shaper, Resort. This condition never triggers. Backend correctly sends business users to /feed with business tier.

critical_code_review_comments: Auth.js lines 180-197: Signup redirect logic correctly handles Surfer, Photographer, Approved Pro, Hobbyist roles
Auth.js line 193: Business role check is dead code - userData.role.includes('Business') never matches actual business roles (School, Coach, etc.)
Backend auth.py correctly returns redirect_path for each role type
Username validation working on both frontend (required field) and backend (3-30 chars, alphanumeric + underscores)
seed_data_creation: Test users created with signuptest_* prefix for signup redirect testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Signup redirect bug is FIXED. After signup, users are correctly redirected based on their role: Surfers → /surfer-subscription, Photographers → /photographer-subscription, Verified Pro → /pro-onboarding, Hobbyist → /feed (free tier), Business → /feed (business tier). Username is required during signup with validation (3-30 chars, alphanumeric + underscores).

features_tested.hobbyist_signup_redirect: PASS - Redirects to /feed (gets free tier automatically)
features_tested.business_signup_redirect: PASS - Redirects to /feed (gets business tier automatically)
features_tested.username_required_validation: PASS - Form prevents submission without username
features_tested.user_logged_in_after_signup: PASS - User data returned, user is logged in

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: After signup, users were being redirected back to the home/login page instead of their proper onboarding flow
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Auth.js line 175 navigated to '/' after signup instead of checking user role and redirecting appropriately
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added role-based redirect logic in Auth.js lines 180-197 matching the login flow
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: CONFIRMED FIXED - All user types now redirect to correct pages after signup
